headlines.headline: NBA expansion: Seattle, Las Vegas, draft format, news, updates
headlines.description: The NBA seems closer than ever to adding two franchises. Here's what we know, including how an expansion draft could work.

headlines.description: The NBA will hold a vote at the board of governors meetings next week to explore adding expansion teams exclusively in Las Vegas and Seattle, sources told ESPN.

headlines.headline: Boye Mafe to help fill void in Bengals' post-Trey Hendrickson era
